findings.title: Object lookup lacks an ownership authorization check
evidence: The authenticated route queries the caller-controlled accountId and returns the object without an ownership or tenant predicate.
findings.attack_path: An authenticated user substitutes another account identifier in the route.
findings.remediation: Authorize the requested object against the authenticated subject and tenant at the data-access boundary.
findings.verification: Use two synthetic accounts and assert cross-account identifiers are denied.

release.rationale: A confirmed High authorization finding blocks release.
